features.title: Everything You Need
features.subtitle: Powerful batch file management built specifically for photographers

items.title: Multi-Source Folder Support
items.description: Add multiple source folders at once — perfect for pulling photos from several SD cards or camera bodies in a single run.

items.title: EXIF-Based Rename
items.description: Reads the actual shooting date and time from your photo's EXIF metadata — not the file creation date, which can change during copy.

items.title: Multi-Camera RAW Support
items.description: Built-in presets for Nikon (.nef, .nrw), Canon (.cr2, .cr3), Sony (.arw), Fujifilm (.raf), Panasonic (.rw2), Olympus (.orf), Pentax (.pef, .dng), Leica (.dng), and more.

items.title: Flexible Filename Formats
items.description: Choose from 4 date-time formats, add a custom prefix, and set the starting sequence number. Preview the output filename in real time before running.

items.title: Dry Run Mode
items.description: Preview exactly what will happen before touching a single file. The log shows all source → destination paths without performing any file operations.

items.title: Copy or Move Operations
items.description: Choose to copy files (originals stay untouched) or move them (originals deleted after successful transfer). Warning is displayed before move operations.

items.title: Organize into Date Subfolders
items.description: Automatically create YYYY-MM-DD subfolders inside the output folder, grouping your renamed files by shooting day.

items.title: Paired JPG + RAW Handling
items.description: Keep JPG and RAW files paired together. Enable 'Only paired files' to skip any file that doesn't have a matching counterpart.

items.title: Real-Time Color-Coded Log
items.description: Watch every file operation happen in real time. Each log entry shows the full source path and destination path with color-coded status tags.

items.title: Automatic Updates
items.description: LightOps checks GitHub Releases for new versions on startup and notifies you in-app. Update with one click — no manual downloads needed.

download.title: Download LightOps
download.subtitle: Free, open source, no sign-up required. Pick your platform.

platforms.name: Windows
platforms.note: NSIS installer · WiX MSI also available

download.alreadyInstalledDesc: LightOps checks for updates automatically on startup. You'll be notified in-app when a new version is available.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: From SD card to organized library in 4 simple steps

steps.title: Add Your Source Folders
steps.description: Drag and drop or browse to add one or more folders containing your photos. Perfect for pulling from multiple SD cards simultaneously.

steps.title: Configure Your Settings
steps.description: Choose your camera brand to auto-fill RAW extensions. Set a filename format, prefix, and output folder. Preview the output filename in real time.

steps.title: Preview with Dry Run
steps.description: Click 'Dry Run' to see exactly what will happen — every file's source and destination path — without touching any files. Review the full log before committing.

steps.title: Run and Relax
steps.description: Hit 'Run'. Watch the real-time log as LightOps renames and organizes your files. A progress bar tracks every file processed.

screenshots.title: The Interface
screenshots.subtitle: Clean, minimal, and powerful — designed for focus

states.label: Idle / Ready
states.description: Clean starting state — add folders and configure your settings.

states.label: Dry Run Active
states.description: Preview every file rename before committing. Zero risk.

states.label: Rename Complete
states.description: All files organized, color-coded log, stats at a glance.

highlights: Multi-source folder support with drag & drop
Camera presets: Nikon, Canon, Sony, Fujifilm, Panasonic, Olympus, Pentax, Leica
Dry run mode for safe preview

footer.madeWith: Made with ❤️ and a lot of ☕
